query:
-- 查询物料A1300038的原始来货数量
SELECT 
  id, 
  material_code, 
  daily_schedule,
  created_at
FROM material_items 
WHERE material_code = 'A1300038'
LIMIT 1;

-- 查询该物料的供应商份额配置
SELECT 
  id,
  material_code,
  supplier_id,
  share_percentage,
  created_at
FROM material_supplier_mappings 
WHERE material_code = 'A1300038'
ORDER BY supplier_id;
